bosses.name: The Keep Warden
bosses.telegraph: The Warden hefts its cleaver. Below half health its fury doubles - end it fast or guard the rage.
bosses.description: A towering brute that guards the ruined keep.

bosses.name: The Crystal Sorcerer
bosses.telegraph: Frost gathers round the Sorcerer. Each fallen servant feeds its magic - strike the master first.
bosses.description: A mage who weaves ice and venom in the crystal depths.

bosses.name: The Hollow Commander
bosses.telegraph: The Commander signals the pack. Below half health it rallies its fallen once - silence it first.
bosses.description: A cunning leader who fights amid a loyal warband.

bosses.name: The Endless Tyrant
bosses.telegraph: The Tyrant surges forward. Its opening blow lands doubled - guard the first strike, then answer.
bosses.description: A tyrant who throws wave upon wave of minions.

bosses.name: The Deep King
bosses.telegraph: The Deep King hefts its greataxe. Below half health its blows redouble - break it quickly.
bosses.description: A crowned colossus that rules the deepest crystal seams.

bosses.name: The Blight Matron
bosses.telegraph: Spores swirl about the Matron. Each fallen servant feeds her blight - fell the mistress first.
bosses.description: A plague-witch who festers in the hollow wood.
